results.title: Shubman Gill on his haunches, Ravi Shastri asks 'Where's the fevicol?' after Sai Sudharsan's bizarre hit-wicket - WATCH
results.description: Gujarat Titans batter Sai Sudharsan experienced a rare hit-wicket dismissal twice in consecutive IPL matches. This unusual event occurred during Qualifier 2 against Rajasthan Royals. Despite this setback, Gujarat Titans secured a seven-wicket victory. Skipper Shubman Gill expressed surprise at the repeated dismissal. Gujarat Titans will now face Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the final.

results.title: Five Cowboys qualify for NCAA Championships; Two school records fall on third day of NCAA West First Round
results.description: FAYETTEVILLE, Ark. – Oklahoma State men's outdoor track & field capped off the men's portion of the NCAA West First Round on Friday in Fayetteville, Ark., with five more Cowboys qualifying for the NCAA Outdoor Championships and a pair of school records going down.
